query:
SELECT ppg.planId, ppg.groupId, pg.name as groupName, pg.nameAr
FROM permission_plan_groups ppg
JOIN permission_groups pg ON ppg.groupId = pg.id
WHERE ppg.planId = 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT ppg.planId, ppg.groupId, pg.name as groupName, pg.nameAr
FROM permission_plan_groups ppg
JOIN permission_groups pg ON ppg.groupId = pg.id
WHERE ppg.planId = 3;
